name: TeklaStructuresFiles
summary: The TeklaStructuresFiles class is for the paths where the attributes file will be searched for.

constructors.name: TeklaStructuresFiles
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the TeklaStructuresFiles class.

methods.name: GetAttributeFile(String)
methods.summary: Gets a file info representing the first match in the standard property file directories.

methods.name: GetAttributeFile(List.String., String)
methods.summary: Gets a file info representing the first match in the search directories.

methods.name: GetFileDictionaryByExtension
methods.summary: Retrieves a dictionary of file names and their corresponding paths from multiple directories.

methods.name: GetMultiDirectoryFileList
methods.summary: Gets a list of files with the given extension from the default search directories.

properties.name: PropertyFileDirectories
properties.summary: The directories where to look for property files.
